prompt:
Professional fashion editorial photography for a luxury magazine, fully clothed, artistic and tasteful.

Ultra-realistic editorial luxury magazine cover featuring two stunning Korean women in perfectly coordinated black and gold looks. Woman 1: a strapless structured black velvet column gown with gold embroidered trim and a dramatic thigh-high slit, black satin gloves to elbow. Woman 2: a deep gold liquid-satin halter gown with a plunging neckline and a flowing bias-cut skirt. Both wear their dark hair up — one in a sleek chignon, one in a twisted crown braid with gold pins. Flawless skin, bold black smoky eyes, matte deep-rouge lips. Statement gold and diamond jewelry — oversized hoop earrings, stacked tennis bracelets, cocktail rings. One woman stands behind, both hands on the other's waist — luxuriously intimate editorial pose. Background: seamless black velvet studio, dramatic amber-gold split lighting with deep shadow. "BAZAAR" tall serif masthead in gold foil tone. 85mm lens, ultra-detailed velvet and satin, 8K cinematic. Negative: casual, blurry, cartoon, watermark, distorted. 1744x2336
